ingredients: 4 (6 oz) salmon fillets, skin-on or skinless
Sliced scallions and toasted sesame seeds, for garnish (optional)
steps: Make the teriyaki sauce: simmer soy sauce, orange zest and juice, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger until reduced and syrupy; cool.
Marinate salmon in cooled sauce with sesame seeds for about 1 hour.
Remove salmon; bring remaining marinade to a boil to use as a glaze.
Cook salmon (grill or oven) until it reaches your preferred doneness, brushing with glaze during cooking.
Garnish with scallions and sesame seeds and serve.
tips: Bring any used marinade to a full boil before using as a glaze; avoid overcooking salmon by targeting an internal temp around 125-130 F for medium.
